full_tree.reason: The full report keeps every Python file visible, including authoring and migration utilities that are not runtime code.

gated_runtime.rationale: These six files are release-authoring, migration, or documentation generators. They are not invoked by an installed plugin at runtime; compileall and deterministic validation still run over them. No AgentRoom, gate, security, network, parity, packaging, or install-smoke file is omitted.
